calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. JUDGMENT DEBTOR JAMES L FALLEY'S Claim Of Exemption is denied. Defendant has not provided financial information tracing the funds to an exempt source. FORMAL ORDER SIGNED AND MAILED OUT TO ALL PARTIES. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
